description_long: This helmet features a rounded dome with a weathered, battle-worn appearance, predominantly painted in muted green with patches of exposed metallic silver and maroon accents. The front is defined by a distinctive T-shaped black visor, bordered by maroon trim, and a raised brow ridge. On the right side, a prominent rangefinder attachment extends upward, with a rectangular sensor at the top, while the left side displays a series of yellow hash marks and additional scuffing. The rear of the helmet is marked by a vertical maroon grille and more green and silver chipping, indicating heavy use. The surface is matte with visible scratches, dents, and paint wear, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look. The overall design is iconic and instantly recognizable, suggesting a specialized, protective function.
description: A weathered, green and maroon helmet with a T-shaped black visor, rangefinder attachment, and heavy surface wear, evoking a rugged, battle-worn style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped black visor, maroon trim, and the rangefinder attachment on the right side.
description_view_1: Left-front angle highlights the yellow hash marks, side panel details, and more of the helmet's green and maroon color scheme.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the vertical maroon grille, extensive paint chipping, and the back curvature of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right-rear angle emphasizes the rangefinder's attachment mechanism and the weathered, multi-colored surface.
attribute_graphic_design: Weathered, multi-color paint with maroon trim, yellow hash marks, and heavy scuffing; no distinct motifs or text.
